comment: Vendor-lock for Pod Manager shell files vendored into solid-issues (pss-rg3). Run scripts/check-pm-drift.mjs to detect upstream drift.

files.note: Source tokens only (pss-0eb union): the PM's teal palette blocks (sidebar tokens + success/warning) were unioned into solid-issues' own globals.css rather than replaced wholesale. Drift check compares the PM source hash — if it changes, review what changed and apply the delta.
Adapted: uses useSolidSession (not useSession), maps 'initialising' status (not 'loading'), wraps SidebarNav/BottomNav in Suspense for useSearchParams.
Adapted: isActive handles query-param-based views (/?view=board etc.) not just pathname segments.
Adapted: uses CircleDot + 'Solid Issues' wordmark instead of ShieldCheck + 'Pod Manager'. Pending pss-70t (maintainer wordmark decision).
Adapted: uses useSolidSession (not useSession); SolidProfile.name (not displayName); no avatarUrl field on SolidProfile so AvatarImage omitted.
Replaced: PM nav items are Pod Manager routes; solid-issues uses issue-tracker-specific destinations (Issues/Board/Backlog/Epics/Timeline/Calendar/Dashboard/Workload).
Verbatim (was already identical to PM version — no new AvatarBadge/Group exports used yet).
